page 1, title: Chemohormonal Therapy in Metastatic Hormone-Sensitive Prostate Cancer: Long-Term Survival Analysis of the Randomized Phase III E3805 CHAARTED Trial. The title indicates this is a long-term survival analysis, thus a follow-up study.
